Boogu Image 0.1 Turbo.desc: Boogu Image 0.1 Turbo is the distilled fast inference variant of Boogu Image with the same Qwen3-VL instruction encoder and Boogu transformer architecture.

Boogu Image 0.1 Edit Turbo.desc: Boogu Image 0.1 Edit Turbo is the distilled editing variant of Boogu Image with motion-aware instruction encoding and fast flow-match inference.

StabilityAI StableDiffusion XL Turbo.desc: SDXL-Turbo is a fast generative text-to-image model that can synthesize photorealistic images from a text prompt in a 1-4 steps.

Krea 2 Turbo.desc: Krea 2 (K2) Turbo is the 8-step distilled inference model of the Krea 2 family, trained from scratch by Krea. A 12.9B-parameter single-stream flow-matching DiT that uses a Qwen3-VL-4B vision-language model as its text encoder and the Qwen-Image VAE. Runs without classifier-free guidance; LoRAs trained on Krea 2 Base apply directly.
Krea 2 Turbo.extras: sampler: Default, cfg_scale: 1.0, steps: 8, width: 1024, height: 1024

StabilityAI Stable Diffusion 3.5 Turbo.desc: Stable Diffusion 3.5 Large Turbo is a Multimodal Diffusion Transformer (MMDiT) text-to-image model with Adversarial Diffusion Distillation (ADD) that features improved performance in image quality, typography, complex prompt understanding, and resource-efficiency, with a focus on fewer inference steps.

Microsoft Lens Turbo.desc: Microsoft Lens-Turbo is the distilled Lens variant optimized for faster text-to-image generation with fewer steps.

Tencent FLUX.1 Dev SRPO.desc: FLUX.1 Dev SRPO is Tencent trained with specific technique: Directly Aligning the Full Diffusion Trajectory with Fine-Grained Human Preference

HiDream-O1 Image Dev.desc: HiDream-O1-Image-Dev is the distilled 8B HiDream-O1 variant tuned for 28-step fast generation using flash flow scheduling.

Qwen-Image-Lightning.desc: Qwen-Lightning is step-distilled from Qwen-Image to allow for generation in 8 steps.

Qwen-Image-Distill.desc: Qwen-Image-Distill is a distilled and accelerated version of Qwen-Image by DiffSynth-Studio.

Baidu ERNIE-Image-Turbo.desc: ERNIE-Image-Turbo is a distilled ERNIE-Image variant optimized for fast generation with fewer denoising steps.

Qwen-Image-Lightning-Edit.desc: Qwen-Lightning-Edit is step-distilled from Qwen-Image-Edit to allow for generation in 8 steps.

Qwen-Image Pruning-12B.desc: This open-source project is based on Qwen-Image and has attempted model pruning, removing 20 layers while retaining the weights of 40 layers, resulting in a model size of 12B parameters.

Qwen-Image-Edit Pruning-13B.desc: This open-source project is based on Qwen-Image-Edit and has attempted model pruning, removing 20 layers while retaining the weights of 40 layers, resulting in a model size of 13.6B parameters.

Qwen-Image-Edit-2509 Pruning-13B.desc: This open-source project is based on Qwen-Image-Edit and has attempted model pruning, removing 20 layers while retaining the weights of 40 layers, resulting in a model size of 13.6B parameters.

lodestones Chroma1 Flash.desc: Chroma is a 8.9B parameter model based on FLUX.1-schnell. It’s fully Apache 2.0 licensed, ensuring that anyone can use, modify, and build on top of it—no corporate gatekeeping. A fine-tuned version of the Chroma1-Base made to find the best way to make these flow matching models faster.

SDXL Flash Mini.desc: Introducing the new fast model SDXL Flash (Mini), we learned that all fast XL models work fast, but the quality decreases, and we also made a fast model, but it is not as fast as LCM, Turbo, Lightning and Hyper, but the quality is higher.
SDXL Flash Mini.extras: width: 2048, height: 1024, sampler: DEIS, steps: 40, cfg_scale: 6.0

NVLabs Sana 1.5 1.6B 1k Sprint.desc: SANA-Sprint is an ultra-efficient diffusion model for text-to-image (T2I) generation, reducing inference steps from 20 to 1-4 while achieving state-of-the-art performance.

Segmind SSD-1B.desc: The Segmind Stable Diffusion Model (SSD-1B) offers a compact, efficient, and distilled version of the SDXL model. At 50% smaller and 60% faster than Stable Diffusion XL (SDXL), it provides quick and seamless performance without sacrificing image quality.

Segmind Tiny.desc: Segmind's Tiny-SD offers a compact, efficient, and distilled version of Realistic Vision 4.0 and is up to 80% faster than SD1.5

Tencent HunyuanImage 2.1 Distilled.desc: HunyuanImage-2.1, a highly efficient text-to-image model that is capable of generating 2K (2048 × 2048) resolution images.

Bria Fibo-Lite.desc: BRIA Fibo-lite is a lightweight, distilled variant of FIBO optimized for fast inference while maintaining strong image quality. Ideal for resource-constrained environments.

Tencent HunyuanDiT 1.2 Distilled.desc: Hunyuan-DiT : A Powerful Multi-Resolution Diffusion Transformer with Fine-Grained Chinese Understanding.

Tencent HunyuanDiT 1.1 Distilled.desc: Hunyuan-DiT : A Powerful Multi-Resolution Diffusion Transformer with Fine-Grained Chinese Understanding.

Black Forest Labs FLUX.2 Klein 4B.desc: FLUX.2-klein-4B is a 4 billion parameter size-distilled version of FLUX.2-dev optimized for consumer GPUs. Achieves sub-second inference with 4 steps. Supports both text-to-image generation and multi-reference image editing. Apache 2.0 licensed.

Black Forest Labs FLUX.2 Klein 9B.desc: FLUX.2-klein-9B is a 9 billion parameter size-distilled version of FLUX.2-dev. Higher quality than 4B variant with sub-second inference using 4 steps. Supports text-to-image and multi-reference editing. Non-commercial license.

Black Forest Labs FLUX.2 Klein 9B KV.desc: FLUX.2 klein 9B KV is an optimized variant of FLUX.2 klein 9B with KV-cache support for accelerated multi-reference editing. This variant caches key-value pairs from reference images during the first denoising step, eliminating redundant computation in subsequent steps for significantly faster multi-image editing workflows.

Anima 1.0 Turbo.desc: Anima 1.0 Turbo, distilled for fast generation with increased stability and a strong default style. A 2B parameter anime-focused text-to-image model based on modified Cosmos-Predict-2B with Qwen3-0.6B text encoder, created by CircleStone Labs and Comfy Org.

Meituan LongCat Image-Edit Turbo.desc: LongCat-Image-Edit-Turbo, the distilled version of LongCat-Image-Edit. It achieves high-quality image editing with only 8 NFEs (Number of Function Evaluations) , offering extremely low inference latency.
